name: kyc_onboarding
description: a KYC onboarding world with verification tiers; actions submit_docs, verify, approve, reject

card.description: a KYC onboarding world with verification tiers; actions submit_docs, verify, approve, reject

rules: Verification tiers run from 1 (basic) to 3 (enhanced); tier N requires N documents and N passed checks.
submit_docs files one document per call, capped at the requested tier's requirement, and moves the applicant to 'submitted'.
verify runs one check per call and records an attempt; a check clears only when a supporting document is already on file.
An applicant becomes 'verified' once both passed checks and filed documents meet the requested tier.
approve only succeeds from 'verified' and grants the requested tier; reject is allowed from any non-terminal stage and grants tier 0.
'approved' and 'rejected' are terminal stages: further actions leave the state unchanged.

emit.report: KYC {applicant}: stage={stage}, requested tier {requested_tier}, granted tier {granted_tier} ({docs_count} docs, {checks_passed} checks). {decision_reason}
